## Boundary-Aware RAI: Pull Request Qualification

Thank you for contributing to the 1:10B+ baseline. Because this framework enforces strict mathematical and ethical boundaries, all contributors must complete this verification checklist before their code will be reviewed.

### 📋 Mandatory Architectural & Ethical Checklist
- [ ] I have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the **Multi-Layered License Agreement** (OpenRAIL Base + Attachment A + HLOS 3.0).
- [ ] My implementation physically separates sovereign/local data from cloud telemetry, strictly respecting the **Localized Sovereignty** mandate.
- [ ] I have included or linked to the formal verification 📐 demonstrating that this submission mathematically respects the **1:10B+ ($10^{-10}$)** safety baseline.
- [ ] I confirm this implementation actively protects undocumented, unrepresented human populations and the broader planetary biosphere from systemic harm or ecocide.

### 🛠️ Implementation Summary
*Please provide a brief summary of how your code addresses Issue #1 or Issue #2. Specifically, outline the formal verification methodology you used to prove the $10^{-10}$ baseline:*
